{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Herald of the Tidewalker Sect
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Herald of the Tidewalker Sect]] was involved in a battle with the [[Winter Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
